allow: PowerShell(Remove-Item -Force "C:\\Users\\vamsi\\Desktop\\Career OS\\apps\\web\\components\\Header.tsx"; Remove-Item -Force "C:\\Users\\vamsi\\Desktop\\Career OS\\apps\\web\\components\\providers\\ClientProviders.tsx"; Remove-Item -Force "C:\\Users\\vamsi\\Desktop\\Career OS\\apps\\web\\components\\layout\\Footer.tsx"; if \(\(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\vamsi\\Desktop\\Career OS\\apps\\web\\components\\providers"\) -and -not \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\vamsi\\Desktop\\Career OS\\apps\\web\\components\\providers"\)\) { Remove-Item "C:\\Users\\vamsi\\Desktop\\Career OS\\apps\\web\\components\\providers" }; Write-Output "Deleted Header, ClientProviders, Footer \(and empty providers/ dir if applicable\)")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("Killing PID " + $_.OwningProcess\); Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "Nothing listening on 3002" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "STILL HELD" } else { Write-Output "Port 3002 free" })

PowerShell(foreach \($p in @\(5000, 3002\)\) { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Write-Output \("Port " + $p + ": held by PID " + $conn.OwningProcess + " -- stopping"\); Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Output \("Port " + $p + ": free"\) } })
